title: ConfigMaps, Secrets, Environment, Projection, Rotation, and Change Propagation · API Object Lens: K8s Projected Volumes Downward Api
summary: A payment-free intake service mixes public config with credentials, assumes environment values rotate, and releases without proving how changed data reaches running Pods. Planned artifact: Add and verify the k8s projected volumes downward api increment in configuration and secret propagation contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose Secret, ConfigMap, service account token, downward API, and cluster trust bundle projections with scoped paths, modes, audiences, and refresh behavior.
Distinguish base64 representation, API and etcd encryption, transport protection, RBAC, node exposure, application use, and external secret authority.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio

version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example release embeds a credential in Git, mixes immutable and rotating config, uses env projection where a file watch is required, and grants broad Secret reads. Separate creation, consumption, update propagation, encryption, RBAC, and rotation evidence. Competency probe: Compose Secret, ConfigMap, service account token, downward API, and cluster trust bundle projections with scoped paths, modes, audiences, and refresh behavior. content.code:
# Worked focus: k8s-projected-volumes-downward-api — Compose Secret, ConfigMap, service account token, downward API, and cluster trust bundle projections with scoped paths, modes, audiences, and refresh behavior.
  # Evidence: k8s-worked-k8s-config-secrets-projection-3
  - competency: k8s-worked-k8s-config-secrets-projection-3
    artifact: config-secret-policy.yaml
    decision: worked k8s config secrets projection 3
    environment: shared multi-tenant cluster under Restricted Pod Security
    fault-injection: drop one metrics series during an autoscaling surge
    retained-proof: accessible incident timeline with causal regression evidence
    case-key: worked3
    change: |
      public-config: immutable-configmap
      runtime-secret: projected-bound-source
      token-audience: intake-api
      environment-refresh: rollout-required
      mounted-refresh: observed
      redaction: enforced
    verify: kubectl get configmap status-config -o json && kubectl auth can-i get secrets --as system:serviceaccount:intake:status-api
    failure: Reject base64-as-encryption, static environment rotation, broad secret reads, subPath refresh claims, or values leaked through rendered output.
    repair: Separate config and secret authority, scope projections and audiences, trigger observable rollouts, rotate credentials, and verify redaction.
